summary: Preserve xAI display casing, mark account-specific live dogfood probes, add model-planning novel commands, and fix reviewed command semantics.
reason: The generated CLI needed xAI-specific publication adjustments: root help should preserve the vendor's official xAI casing; the full-live dogfood matrix should skip read endpoints that require existing deferred completions, files, stored responses, skills, video-generation jobs, or account-tier-specific model-family access; the published CLI benefits from model-picker, cost-preview, model-capabilities, and smoke-chat commands that compose xAI's live model metadata into agent-ready workflows; and review found that latest-model ranking must use full creation timestamps while explicit zero values for legacy temperature/top-p flags must be preserved. These commands remain grounded in live API data; the annotations only prevent placeholder fixture probes from failing publication validation.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., verify-skill, publish validate, and full live publish dogfood all pass. Full live publish dogfood passed 139/139 matrix entries with 109 account-tier or fixture-dependent commands skipped.
